song.title: More Love to Thee O Christ
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) More love to Thee, O Christ, More love to Thee! Hear Thou the prayer I make On bended knee;|| This is my earnest plea: More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee, More love to Thee!
[V2] 2) Once earthly joy I craved, Sought peace and rest; Now Thee alone I seek, Give what is best;|| This all my prayer shall be: More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee, More love to Thee!
[V3] 3) Let sorrow do its work, Send grief and pain; Sweet are Thy messengers, Sweet their refrain,|| When they can sing with me, More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee, More love to Thee!
[V4] 4) Then shall my latest breath Whisper Thy praise; This be the parting cry My heart shall raise;|| This still its prayer shall be: More love, O Christ, to Thee, More love to Thee, More love to Thee!
song.author: Elizabeth Payson Prentiss
